post.description: Ingest content from a local file on the server.

Upload and ingest files.
- If it's a single non-markdown file, use MarkItDown.
- If it's multiple files or a markdown file, treat as a native NoteInput.

get.description:
List vaults.

Query params:
- state: Optional filter by state. Use 'active' for the active vault.
- is_default: Optional filter by default status. True for default vaults.

parameters.name: state

schema.description: Filter by state: "active" for active vault
schema.title: State

parameters.description: Filter by state: "active" for active vault

schema.description: Newline-delimited JSON. Each line is a VaultDTO object.

get.description:
Get a vault by ID or resolve by name.

If the identifier is a valid UUID, returns the vault with that ID.
Otherwise, treats it as a name and resolves to the vault's ID.

schema.title: Response Get Or Resolve Vault Api V1 Vaults  Identifier  Get

get.description:
List notes.

Query params:
- limit: Maximum number of notes to return
- offset: Number of notes to skip
- sort: Optional sort option. Use '-created_at' for most recent first.

note_id.description: The unique identifier of the ingested note.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Reason for skipping or failure, if applicable.

vault_id.title: Vault Id
vault_id.description: The UUID or name of the vault this record belongs to.

reflect_after.title: Reflect After
reflect_after.description: Whether to run reflection after ingestion.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: Optional dictionary of assets (filename -> base64 content).

IngestURLRequest.title: IngestURLRequest
IngestURLRequest.description: Request to ingest content from a URL.

entity_type.title: Entity Type
entity_type.description: The type of the entity (mental_model, observation, etc.)

entity.title: Entity
entity.description: The full DTO of the entity.

derived_from.title: Derived From
derived_from.description: List of entities this entity is derived from (upstream) or that are derived from it (downstream).

vault_id.title: Vault Id
vault_id.description: The UUID or name of the vault this record belongs to.

text.title: Text
text.description: The textual content of the memory unit.

fact_type.description: The type/category of the memory unit.

mentioned_at.title: Mentioned At
mentioned_at.description: The datetime when the memory unit was mentioned.

occurred_start.title: Occurred Start
occurred_start.description: The start datetime of when the fact/event occurred.

occurred_end.title: Occurred End
occurred_end.description: The end datetime of when the fact/event occurred.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier of the memory unit.

note_id.title: Note Id
note_id.description: The unique identifier of the source note.

source_note_ids.title: Source Note Ids
source_note_ids.description: List of source note IDs. For facts, typically single. For opinions, derived from evidence.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the memory unit.

score.title: Score
score.description: Relevance score from retrieval or reranking (0.0 to 1.0).

confidence_alpha.title: Confidence Alpha
confidence_alpha.description: Alpha parameter of Beta distribution (positive evidence).

confidence_beta.title: Confidence Beta
confidence_beta.description: Beta parameter of Beta distribution (negative evidence).

NodeDTO.description: DTO for a note node (section produced by PageIndex).

note_key.title: Note Key
note_key.description: A unique stable key for the note to enable incremental updates.

description.title: Description
description.description: A brief description or summary of the note.
examples: Notes from the weekly team sync.

content.title: Content
content.description: Base64 encoded content of the note.

files.title: Files
files.description: Dictionary mapping filenames to Base64 encoded content.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: List of tags associated with the note.

vault_id.title: Vault Id
vault_id.description: Optional target vault ID or name.

NoteCreateDTO.title: NoteCreateDTO
NoteCreateDTO.description: DTO for creating a Note artifact (input/ingestion).

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Run skeleton-tree identification — returns reasoning + relevant section IDs.

summarize.title: Summarize
summarize.description: Synthesize a full answer from identified sections (implies reason=True).

mmr_lambda.title: Mmr Lambda
mmr_lambda.description: MMR lambda for relevance-diversity trade-off. 1.0 = pure relevance, 0.0 = max diversity. None = use server config default (which itself defaults to disabled).

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique identifier of the observation.

title.title: Title
title.description: Short title or headline for the observation.

content.title: Content
examples: The user consistently chooses Python for new projects due to its simplicity.

trend.title: Trend
trend.description: Current trend of this observation (e.g. new, stable, strengthening).

ObservationDTO.title: ObservationDTO
ObservationDTO.description: DTO for an Observation (Mental Model component).

vault_id.title: Vault Id
vault_id.description: The UUID or name of the vault this record belongs to.

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: The UUID of the entity to reflect upon.

limit_recent_memories.title: Limit Recent Memories
limit_recent_memories.description: Number of recent memories to consider.

ReflectionRequest.title: ReflectionRequest
ReflectionRequest.description: Request to run the reflection loop on a specific entity.

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: The UUID of the entity reflected upon.

new_observations.title: New Observations
new_observations.description: List of new observations generated during reflection.

query.title: Query
query.description: The search query or context string.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

token_budget.title: Token Budget
token_budget.description: Maximum token budget for results (greedy packing).

vault_ids.title: Vault Ids
vault_ids.description: List of specific vault IDs or names to search. If None or empty, searches ALL vaults.

rerank.title: Rerank
rerank.description: Whether to apply neural reranking if available.

strategy_weights.title: Strategy Weights
strategy_weights.description: Optional custom weights for RRF fusion.

strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.description: Inclusion list of strategies to run. Valid values: semantic, keyword, graph, temporal, mental_model. If None, all strategies are used.

include_vectors.title: Include Vectors
include_vectors.description: Whether to include embeddings in the result (slower).

include_stale.title: Include Stale
include_stale.description: Whether to include stale memory units in results.

skip_opinion_formation.title: Skip Opinion Formation
skip_opinion_formation.description: Whether to skip the automated opinion formation loop.

RetrievalRequest.title: RetrievalRequest
RetrievalRequest.description: Unified request object for memory retrieval.

SummaryRequest.description: Request for AI-generated summary of search results.

SummaryResponse.title: SummaryResponse
SummaryResponse.description: Response containing an AI-generated summary with citations.

reflection_queue.title: Reflection Queue
reflection_queue.description: Number of items in the reflection queue.

TokenUsageStatDTO.description: Token usage for a specific date.

id.description: The unique identifier of the vault.
